title: ILifeLimiter
description: Manage the lives of players on your server. Each player gets a limited number of lives.
body:
SUPPORTED BY - [IRUKA-SHOP](https://iruka-shop.site/product?id=28)

LANGUAGE SUPPORT:
- English, Russian, Ukrainian, Polski, 中文, Français, Español 



⭐ PLUGIN DESCRIPTION:

The plugin adds a life system to your Minecraft server. When a player dies, he loses one life, and when all lives are lost, he is automatically banned. Admins can manage the number of player lives, unban them and set a new number of lives.


🎯 PLUGIN FEATURES

-    💾 Automatic data saving to SQLite 
-    🌍 Support for 7 languages
-    ⚡ Asynchronous caching for high performance
-    🎮 Integration with PlaceholderAPI
-    ⚙️ Flexible customization via config.yml
-    🔒 Access rights system
-    📊 Customizable ban/unban commands


📊 PlaceholderAPI

-  %lifelimiter_hearts% - current number of player's lives
-  %lifelimiter_max_hearts% - maximum number of lives
-  %lifelimiter_min_hearts% - minimum number of lives
 
🎮 Plugin commands
-  /ll add <player> <number> - Add lives to player
-  /ll give life-stealer <player> - Give a syringe of life to a player
-  /ll remove <player> <quantity> - Remove lives from a player
-  /ll unban <player> <number> - Unban a player and set the number of lives
-  /ll reload - Reload the plugin configuration
-  /ll help - Show help on commands
 
🔒 Plugin permissions

-   lifelimiter.admin
